scoring.xyPredictionAccuracy: exact match over tN_sK held-out keys, for (x, y) only
scoring.wPredictionAccuracy: exact match over tN_sK held-out keys, for w only — trivial if the clock rule is found
scoring.decoyDeclaredInert: the attempt's explicit answer to the causal-structure question, recorded as declared
scoring.decoyFoldedIntoLaw: mechanical: penalize if the stated x or y update equation references w at all, regardless of prediction accuracy
scoring.decoyCorrectlyIdentified: credit only when the inert declaration is corroborated by the stated law itself (no w in the x/y updates, no x/y in the w update) — a declaration alone never stands in for the mechanical check
